div1.entryFree:
Welfare, 1) wellbeing, good health; until her husband's w. she did hear, Lucr. 263. and sick of w., found a kind of meetness to be diseased, Sonn. 118, 7. we have been praying for our husbands' w. Merch. V, 114 (Q1 healths).
2) prosperity, happiness: H6B III, 1, 80. H6C IV, 3, 39. Tit. V, 3, 110.
